title: Add matter member invite flow with role assignment
description: Allow matter attorneys to invite colleagues by email with a role (attorney, paralegal, viewer). Invited users receive a Clerk-powered email invitation and are added to MatterMember on acceptance.

acceptance_criteria.text: Attorney can invite a user by email and assign them a role from the matter settings
Invited user appears as 'pending' in the matter members list
On sign-up/sign-in, pending invites are auto-accepted and MatterMember record created
Only attorneys can invite members or change roles

steps: Add MatterInvite model to Prisma schema (email, role, matterId, token, expiresAt)
Create invite server action: generate token, send email via Clerk or Resend
Create /api/invites/accept route to validate token and create MatterMember
Add Members tab or section to matter settings page
Handle already-registered vs new user flows
risks: Email delivery in Replit environment — may need Resend or Clerk email templates configured
